untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern detection (pattern height, breakout price, highest high/lowest low within pattern formation period, and comparison to median height ratio). These require multi-bar pattern recognition, pattern boundary detection, and historical median calculation across a dataset. The allowed indicators are limited to single-bar or simple moving average calculations and do not support: (1) pattern shape identification, (2) dynamic pattern period detection, (3) median calculation of a custom metric across historical patterns, or (4) breakout price determination relative to pattern formation. A proper implementation would require custom pattern recognition logic external to these indicators.
translation_notes: The signal describes a sophisticated pattern classification system comparing height-to-breakout ratios against historical medians. This requires pattern analysis capabilities beyond standard technical indicators. The entry/exit conditions provided are placeholder reversals. The hold_days_max of 64 is derived from the stated average formation length. To implement this signal properly, a custom pattern detector module would be needed that can: identify pattern boundaries, calculate pattern height, determine breakout prices, and compute height-to-price ratios compared to median historical values.
